text: Hello, my name is Felicia Guo. I'm a PR and a journalist based in New York City and I'm very happy to try this new technique. And I think it's very good to promote Chinatown and to just to bring this legacy to the next level and to the tourists of all over the world. And I think Chinatown has a very rich history. This is a really good way to bring the technology in and bring the culture out to the world. What are the good things and bad things during your play? That part, because I haven't finished the play. But I think it's a great idea of this AR technology and really appreciate the developer who bring Chinatown to be the target to do this whole experience. So I think that's a very good thing for Chinatown and especially for Chinese people. And I think the culture is very important and really appreciate that people see this and see us and help to promote Chinese culture. Thank you.
